title: bract fleet config
description: Schema for bract.yml — declarative fleet configuration

version.description: Config schema version. Currently must be 1.

home.description: Where to store agent state. Default: ~/.bract

name.description: Unique agent name. Lowercase letters, digits, hyphens only.

model.description: Model identifier e.g. qwen3.5:9b or claude-sonnet-4-6

restart.description: Restart policy if the agent process exits.

env.description: Environment variables injected into the agent. Supports ${VAR} expansion.

memory.description: Pre-seeded key-value memory entries written to agents/{name}/memory/ at first start.

triggers.description: What wakes this agent up proactively.

pipes.description: Forward messages from another agent's outbox into this agent's inbox.

mcp.description: MCP servers to attach to this agent.

skills.description: Skill files (npm package or local path) appended to system prompt.

cron.description: Standard 5-field cron expression in local timezone.

webhook.description: HTTP path to expose as a webhook trigger. E.g. /hooks/my-agent

message.description: Message body sent to the agent when the trigger fires.

from.description: Name of the agent whose outbox to watch.

filter.description: Only forward messages whose body contains this substring.

server.description: MCP server package name, local path, or URL.

config.description: Config passed to the MCP server.
